test_cases.name: health_check_success
test_cases.description: Verify the health endpoint returns a successful response.

test_cases.name: create_author_valid_data
test_cases.description: Create a new author with all required fields.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without the required name field.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_pagination
test_cases.description: Retrieve a list of authors with default pagination parameters.

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by their ID.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve an author with a non-existent ID.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Attempt to update an author with an incorrect If-Match header (ETag mismatch).

test_cases.name: create_book_valid_data
test_cases.description: Create a new book with all required fields.

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that is too short.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Retrieve a paginated list of books filtered by author and price range.

test_cases.name: get_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing book by its ID.

test_cases.name: get_book_soft_deleted
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a book that has been soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Perform a soft delete on an existing book.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book
test_cases.description: Add a new review to an existing book.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_within_limit
test_cases.description: Apply a valid discount percentage to a book.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_rate_limit_exceeded
test_cases.description: Exceed the rate limit for the discount endpoint (5 req/10s).

test_cases.name: upload_cover_valid_file
test_cases.description: Upload a valid image file (JPEG/PNG) as a book cover.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_file_too_large
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a cover image exceeding the 2 MB size limit.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_without_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt to use the bulk create endpoint without providing the required X-API-Key header.

test_cases.name: create_tag_valid_name
test_cases.description: Create a new tag with a valid name.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book
test_cases.description: Associate multiple existing tags with a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_with_items
test_cases.description: Create a new order with customer details and at least one order item.

test_cases.name: create_order_empty_items
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order with an empty items array.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_valid
test_cases.description: Update an order's status to a valid value (e.g., 'shipped').

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid
test_cases.description: Attempt to update an order's status with an invalid value.

test_cases.name: start_book_export_job
test_cases.description: Initiate an asynchronous book export job.

test_cases.name: get_export_job_status_processing
test_cases.description: Check the status of an export job that is still processing.

test_cases.name: get_maintenance_status
test_cases.description: Retrieve the current maintenance mode status.

test_cases.name: enable_maintenance_mode
test_cases.description: Enable maintenance mode via the admin endpoint.
